issues.description: Missing condition for optional trash cost. Effect should include a condition checking if this Character is trashed, or the trash action should be a prerequisite. Current DSL does not represent 'You may trash this Character and add 1 card from the top of your Life cards to your hand' as a cost.
Missing FlipLife action. The effect includes 'add 1 card from the top of your Life cards to your hand' which should be represented as FlipLife action before the KO action.
KO action missing maxCount parameter. Effect states 'K.O. up to 1' which requires maxCount: 1 to properly limit selection.
